title: Iran says it seized ships in Strait of Hormuz as U.S. blockade continues amid ceasefire
snippet: Iran attacked three ships in the Strait of Hormuz, saying its Revolutionary Guard seized two of them. IRGC named MSC-Francesca and Epaminondas. Accused of operating without authorization and manipulating AIS. Comes hours after Trump extended ceasefire.
tag_reason: NPR의 독자적 보도로 추가 세부사항(3척 공격, 2척 나포) 포함.
